name: Lateral Movement from Partner Network Segment
description: Detects unusual lateral movement originating from partner or vendor network segments
query:
// Detect lateral scanning from partner network segments
// Trigger on connections to multiple internal IPs from partner subnets
events from firewall
where zone_from = "partner"
  and zone_to = "internal"
  and action = "allow"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 20
within 300 seconds
